name: Hot Cross Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over the shortening, sugar, and salt.
2. Add the evaporated milk to the mixture.
3. When the mixture is lukewarm, add the dissolved yeast.
4. Add the beaten eggs.
5. Stir in 4 cups of flour until a soft dough forms.
6. Beat the dough well and add enough flour to make it manageable.
7. Wash and drain the currants; fold them into the dough.
8. Place the dough in a greased bowl, covering the top with grease as well.
9. Cover with waxed paper and a lid or cloth.
10. Keep in a cool place until ready for use.
11. Shape the dough into small buns and let rise until doubled in size.
12. Bake for 15 minutes.
13. Cool and dust with powdered sugar.
Note: Assume moderate oven temperature of 350 - 400°F.
Source: Grace Weller, Rehoboth Center Grange, Perry County, OH
